SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto

Class ManagerIssueReportResponse.UserProfileResponse

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.ManagerIssueReportResponse.UserProfileResponse
Enclosing class:
ManagerIssueReportResponse
public static class ManagerIssueReportResponse.UserProfileResponse extends Object
Nested DTO exposing a subset of UserProfile fields for manager views.

    • isManager

      public boolean isManager()
      Returns whether the user has manager privileges.
      Returns:
      true if manager; false otherwise.

    • setManager

      public void setManager(boolean manager)
      Sets whether the user has manager privileges.
      Parameters:
      manager - true if manager; false otherwise.

      public Instant getTimeCreated()
      Returns the time the user profile was created.

      creation timestamp.

      Sets the time the user profile was created.
      Parameters:
      timeCreated - creation timestamp.

    • isUserEnabled

      public boolean isUserEnabled()
      Returns whether the user account is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if enabled; false otherwise.

    • setUserEnabled

      public void setUserEnabled(boolean userEnabled)
      Sets whether the user account is enabled.
      Parameters:
      userEnabled - true if enabled; false otherwise.

    • fromEntity

      public static ManagerIssueReportResponse.UserProfileResponse fromEntity(UserProfile userProfile)
      Creates a user profile DTO from an entity.
      Parameters:
      userProfile - source entity.
      Returns:
      populated DTO, or null if userProfile is null.
